acceptance_targets: [chapter_12_craft_001] Pass if the revised passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:142 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:190 includes at least one explicit, on-page material consequence tied to the forecast attack lane and that consequence directly triggers the command notification beat; fail if the turn remains only document-summary plus assertion.

[chapter_12_booker_001] Pass if the revised block at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:174 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:196 shows at least two alternate scenarios considered and rejected with concrete reasons from chapter evidence; fail if the text still jumps directly from pattern notes to one deterministic attack script.

[chapter_12_craft_002] Pass if, after the revised beat anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:26, Beau sets one non-negotiable condition with immediate case impact and that condition is still active by snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:84; fail if the scene resolves to reassurance without an unresolved cost.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:142 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:190 includes at least one explicit, on-page material consequence tied to the forecast attack lane and that consequence directly triggers the command notification beat; fail if the turn remains only document-summary plus assertion.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: the chapter's most dangerous pivot is delivered as paperwork recap and inferred logistics, so embodied consequence gets replaced by abstract summary at the point where the narrative should feel physically imminent.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the deduction block centered at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:142, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:176, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:178, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:190 so at least one beat renders concrete bodily/social risk in-scene (not just document inventory), then let that beat force the threat-call decision at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:208.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised block at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:174 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:196 shows at least two alternate scenarios considered and rejected with concrete reasons from chapter evidence; fail if the text still jumps directly from pattern notes to one deterministic attack script.
findings.problem: Causal overreach: Lena moves from partial pattern evidence to a single precise kill method/timeline with near-certainty, so the prevention clock reads author-imposed rather than fully earned by shown reasoning.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:174 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:196, stage an explicit elimination of alternatives (house/courthouse/foundation, and at least one non-blade method) before settling on Service Corridor B, then keep Lena's final call as risk-weighted rather than absolute certainty.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after the revised beat anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:26, Beau sets one non-negotiable condition with immediate case impact and that condition is still active by snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:84; fail if the scene resolves to reassurance without an unresolved cost.
findings.problem: Timidity: the Lena-Beau rupture is introduced as potentially career-altering, then quickly cushioned by humor/caretaking, reducing the lasting interpersonal cost the setup promises.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the hospital span at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:22 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:84 so Beau's near-withdrawal carries a concrete operational boundary that remains unresolved at scene exit; keep Ida's interruption, but make it intensify stakes instead of diffusing them.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
